% check a.php
a.php:10:1: $val is of type: mixed (DEBUG)

-- a.php --
<?php

enum Option: string
{
	case YES = 'yes';
	case NO  = 'no';
}

$val = Option::YES;
#debugType $val

% check b.php
b.php:9:1: $s is of type: self (DEBUG)
b.php:10:1: $t is of type: self|null (DEBUG)
b.php:13:1: $cases is of type: self[] (DEBUG)
b.php:16:1: $name is of type: string (DEBUG)
b.php:17:1: $value is of type: int (DEBUG)

-- b.php --
<?php

enum Status: int
{
	case ACTIVE = 1;
	case INACTIVE = 0;
}

$s = Status::from(1);
#debugType $s
$t = Status::tryFrom(1);
#debugType $t

$cases = Status::cases();
#debugType $cases

$name = Status::ACTIVE->name;
#debugType $name
$value = Status::ACTIVE->value;
#debugType $value

% check c.php

-- c.php --
<?php

trait HasLabel
{
	public function label(): string
	{
		return 'label';
	}
}

enum Color
{
	use HasLabel;

	case RED;
	case GREEN;
}

$c = Color::RED;
$l = $c->label();

% check pure.php
pure.php:10:1: $name is of type: string (DEBUG)
pure.php:11:1: $cases is of type: self[] (DEBUG)

-- pure.php --
<?php

enum Suit
{
	case HEARTS;
	case DIAMONDS;
	case CLUBS;
	case SPADES;
}

$name = Suit::HEARTS->name;
#debugType $name
$cases = Suit::cases();
#debugType $cases
